prompt:
You are an investment assistant proposing additions to an existing equity portfolio.
Cash available: USD 900.00.
Allowed universe: GOOGL, NVO.
Already owned: AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, META, NVDA, AVGO, JPM, UNH, LLY, V, MA, COST, HD, PG, XOM, JNJ.
Recommend at most 2 tickers.
Facts you may cite: none.
Do not recommend already-owned tickers.
Cite only fact ids provided.
Fee arithmetic (already computed for you): a single order deploying your USD 900.00 pays USD 2.50; splitting it into two equal orders pays USD 5.00. The fee is USD 2.50 per started USD 1000 tranche, and the minimum economic order is USD 250.00. Deploy in the fewest tranches; do not split unless it is fee-neutral.
Reply with one JSON object and nothing else, in the form {"tickers": ["AAA", "BBB"], "amounts": [500.0, 750.0], "cited_fact_ids": ["id1"]}. Do not include an "amounts" field unless explicitly required.
